headline: Spain the favorites — Euro 2024 champions with a generational core
summary: Spain enter WC 2026 as betting favorites, riding a run that includes the Euro 2024 title and Olympic gold in Paris. The core is generational: 18-year-old Lamine Yamal (rated by many as the best player at the tournament), a rejuvenated Pedri, and Ballon d'Or-winning anchor Rodri. Many argue this group is younger and deeper than the 2008-2012 golden generation.
angles: Is this Spain side better than the 2008-2012 golden generation?
Can an 18-year-old Yamal actually carry the favorites to the title?
Rodri, Pedri, Yamal — name a stronger spine at this World Cup
Favorites tag = pressure: do Spain crumble or coast?
